title: The Destructive Insects and Pests Act, 1914
full_text: The Destructive Insects and Pests Act, 1914 नाशक कीट और नाशक जीव अधिनियम,1914 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 191402 Act Number: 02 Enactment Date: 1914-02-03 Act Year: 1914 Short Title: The Destructive Insects and Pests Act, 1914 Hindi Title: नाशक कीट और नाशक जीव अधिनियम,1914 Long Title: An act to prevent the introduction into India and the transport from one State to another of any insect, fungus or other pest, which is or may be destructive to crops. Ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare Department: Department of Agriculture, Cooperation and Farmers Welfare Enforcement Date: 03-02-1914 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Destructive Insects and Pests Act, 1914 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Power of Central Government to regulate or prohibit the import of articles likely to infect. Section 4. Operation of notification under section 3. Section 4A. Power of Central Government to regulate or prohibit transport from State to State Section 4B. Refusal to carry article of which transport is prohibited. Section 4C. [Omitted.]. Section 4D. Power of Central Government to make rules. Section 5. Power of State Government to make rules. Section 5A. Penalties. Section 6. Protection to persons acting under Act.
